  "text": "The Kubernetes API server authentication chain is constructed in `pkg/kubeapiserver/authenticator/config.go` (sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0). The main entry point is `Config.New()`, which builds a slice of `authenticator.Request` objects and combines them using `union.New()` from `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/union/union.go`.\n\n**Authenticator Chain Construction** (`pkg/kubeapiserver/authenticator/config.go`):\n- `Config.New()` orchestrates the chain: it creates individual authenticators and appends them to a list, then combines with `union.New()`, and wraps the result with `group.NewAuthenticatedGroupAdder()`.\n\n**Bearer Token Authenticator** (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/bearertoken/bearertoken.go`):\n- `Authenticator` struct wraps an `authenticator.Token` and extracts the Bearer token from the `Authorization` HTTP header. `New()` constructs it.\n\n**Client Certificate Authenticator** (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/x509/x509.go`):\n- `Authenticator` validates TLS client certificates and extracts user info. `NewDynamic()` is used in the chain with `CommonNameUserConversion` to map certificate common names to user identities.\n\n**Service Account Token Authenticator** (`pkg/serviceaccount/jwt.go`):\n- `JWTTokenAuthenticator()` constructs a `jwtTokenAuthenticator` that validates JWT-signed service account tokens. The chain builder calls `newServiceAccountAuthenticator()` and `newLegacyServiceAccountAuthenticator()` in `pkg/kubeapiserver/authenticator/config.go`.\n\n**Anonymous Authenticator** (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/anonymous/anonymous.go`):\n- `NewAuthenticator()` creates an `Authenticator` that returns `system:anonymous` user info when all other authenticators decline a request.\n\n**Additional Chain Components**:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/union/union.go`: `unionAuthRequestHandler` tries authenticators in sequence until one succeeds.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/token/union/union.go`: `unionAuthTokenHandler` chains token authenticators.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/group/authenticated_group_adder.go`: Wraps the entire chain to add `system:authenticated` group.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/headerrequest/requestheader.go`: Request header authenticator (proxy auth).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/request/websocket/protocol.go`: WebSocket bearer token protocol authenticator.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/token/cache/cached_token_authenticator.go`: Token result caching.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/token/tokenfile/tokenfile.go`: Static token file authenticator.\n- `plugin/pkg/auth/authenticator/token/bootstrap/bootstrap.go`: Bootstrap token authenticator.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/authenticator/token/webhook/webhook.go`: Webhook token authenticator.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/authenticator/token/oidc/oidc.go`: OIDC/JWT authenticator.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/authentication.go`: HTTP middleware (`WithAuthentication`) that drives the chain per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/authenticatorfactory/delegating.go` and `loopback.go`: Factory helpers for constructing delegating and loopback authenticators.\n- `pkg/kubeapiserver/options/authentication.go`: CLI options and configuration for the authentication chain."
}
